description: Package capability matrix for the bun-win32 repository. Only packages marked usedInC1:true are in scope for the C1 Doom implementation.

entries.capabilities: Repository Win32 binding package present in inventory; no direct C1 Doom dependency identified during planning.
entries.blockedCapabilities: Keep out of C1 unless a dedicated proof step demonstrates a concrete need.
